classObjective: Evaluate functions using function notation for numerical and algebraic inputs and interpret function values in real-world contexts.
workedExamples: 3-2, Example 3 — Evaluate Functions Using Function Notation
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: f(x) notation; composite inputs; real-world function models
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice evaluating functions with function notation including composite inputs
independentPractice: Practice problems evaluating functions and interpreting function values in real-world contexts
assessment: Exit ticket: evaluate f(2) and f(x+1) for f(x) = 2x² - 3x + 1
capReflection: What does f(x) notation communicate that y notation does not?
